NEWS: Inflation has hit its highest level in 3 years, driven largely by Trump's tariffs and war in Iran.   

@HouseDemocrats have repeatedly tried to roll back these tariffs and rein in this war, but Republicans have enabled Trump every step of the way.
My statement on Republicans' reconciliation package. https://t.co/Le1bugx3ro

Every family deserves reliable access to clean, safe drinking water. 

That's why I'm proud to have secured $3,276,000 in federal funding to help communities across our district replace aging lead service lines and protect public health for generations to come. https://t.co/ZPYQmolHe8
Trump lied, started a war with Iran, and now Americans are paying the price.

We need guardrails now, before these materials end up in the wrong hands.

https://t.co/wJ2RbSvkqS
AI is leveling the playing field for dangerous technical knowledge, like how to misuse commercially available synthetic DNA and RNA to create bioweapons. 🧵

More than two years ago, I sounded the alarm on this with @RepBrownley in a bipartisan letter calling for stronger biosecurity guardrails. Since then, the Trump Administration rescinded the Biden-era screening framework and has failed to put new protections in place.

Tonight, the House passed a bill to provide our allies in Ukraine with long-awaited aid. 

Russia's invasion continues, but so does our support for Ukraine and their freedom fighters. 🇺🇸 🇺🇦
The risk of Iran secretly developing a nuclear weapon has INCREASED since the U.S. attacked Iran. Trump and Netanyahu have made the world a much more dangerous place. https://t.co/6Ka5mI0uW2

The War Powers Resolution PASSED the House!

Republicans, Democrats, and Americans agree: It’s time to end Trump’s war in Iran.

I'm proud to introduce the Know Your Rights Act with @repdeliaramirez to ensure that every immigrant being held in a detention center—man, woman, or child—receives appropriate legal assistance in accordance with due process protections. 

Read more about it here: https://t.co/YCPRhcsCb5

Trump and Commerce Secretary @howardlutnick may have allowed hundreds of thousands of advanced American AI chips to be used by China over the past year and a half.

I hope to see them do more than close a loophole to correct their negligence, but the damage is already done.

Happy Pride, Illinois!

This month, we honor the contributions of LGBTQ+ Americans and reflect on the progress we’ve made toward equality. https://t.co/URb8uWynTU

As your representative in Congress, I’ll keep working to expand access to affordable, high-quality mental health care. https://t.co/dRFqcvzlqr
Eid Mubarak! Wishing those celebrating in Illinois and around the world a joyful Eid al-Adha. https://t.co/7ozpaw7xIg

assessment.whatItWasLike: When this account mentioned the Kurdish file, the language most often clustered around support, partnership, or official-contact language. I count 0 direct Kurdistan/Kurdish-region term hits, 0 security-frame hits, 1 supportive or diplomatic hit, 0 humanitarian/minority hits, and 3 energy/economic hits in the exported profile window.
